parameters.name: alg
parameters.description: Token signing algorithm; required when --content-type is jwt

parameters.name: kid
parameters.description: Public key ID used to verify a JWT policy

parameters.name: attester_type
parameters.description: Attester types covered by the policy as a JSON string array

parameters.name: is_default
parameters.description: Whether to make this the default policy

examples: ctyun ecs remote-attestation policy create --name test_policy --attester-type '["tpm_ima"]' --content-type text --content 'cGFja2Fn…'
